title: Koanophyllon longifolium
taxonomy: Koanophyllon longifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon, which is a group of plants endemic to South America. The plant is classified as a perennial herb, characterized by its long leaves and yellow flowers. Koanophyllon longifolium is further grouped into the tribe Heliantheae, known for its diverse range of species. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this plant.
